creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can't reproduce this issue with a recent version of sbt (1.10.0) on a recent version of FreeBSD (14.1 jail on 15.0-CURRENT) on aarch64. This still uses openjdk8.

$ java -version
openjdk version "1.8.0_422"
OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_422-b05)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.422-b05, mixed mode)

I compiled and ran a "Hello World" example using sbt.

If you have a reproducible testcase please re-open this issue and tell what needs to be done to trigger the problem.

NB: I'm aware that this issue is years old and FreeBSD 12 is EOL since. I'm sorry the issue didn't get more traction back then.
